textPlain: For what it's worth, nighttime wakefulness (past midnight) is associated with an elevated risk for suicide via circadian misalignment:https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC7953996/https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC6314836/I am sharing this because it's an underrecognized cause that builds up.
